architect.description: Premium orchestrator. Delegates aggressively to subagents to control token and cost usage.

architect-premium.description: Escalation architect for the hardest planning and reasoning tasks.

architect-google-premium.description: Premium Google architect for deep second-opinion analysis and Anthropic failover.

architect-openai.description: Fallback architect when Anthropic is rate-limited.

architect-google.description: Secondary fallback architect for cross-provider continuity.

repo-explorer.description: Fast low-cost codebase exploration, file discovery, and impact mapping.

python-service-implementer.description: Implements and refactors Python service-layer logic with minimal patches.

streamlit-page-implementer.description: Handles Streamlit page and session-state UI changes while preserving existing UX patterns.

sql-migration-reviewer.description: Designs and reviews SQL migrations and RBAC changes; no execution unless requested.

test-runner-triager.description: Selects targeted tests, runs verification, and triages failures quickly.

api-cost-guardian.description: Audits Jungle Scout call paths for cache-first behavior and budget-metering compliance.

policy-safety-reviewer.description: Final safety pass for ports, secrets, git safety, and launchpad-vs-market_intel boundaries.
